flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Vanguard University of Southern California rose 36% between 2007 and 2010 ($11.0k → $15.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Vanguard University of Southern California rose 15% between 2007 and 2010 ($23.0k → $26.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Vanguard University of Southern California rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.7k → $41.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Vanguard University of Southern California vs the 2018–2022 baseline (55.9% vs 61.3%).
